events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.

events.name: breakthrough
events.description: Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.

events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Strange crystalline structures found in deep drill core.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Reed Shore wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.

memories.event: Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.
Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.
Ice deposits discovered beneath the eastern ridge.
The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.
Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.
Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.
Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.
